meaning: Paper jam is detected at the paper tray.
customer_remedy: Remove the tray and carefully remove jammed paper.
service_note: Verify paper path and rollers if repeated.

meaning: Paper jam is detected inside the machine.
customer_remedy: Open the cover and remove jammed paper from inside the machine.

meaning: Paper jam is detected at the rear cover.
customer_remedy: Open the rear cover and remove jammed paper.
service_note: Inspect rear paper path if repeated.

meaning: Paper jam is detected in the duplex path.
customer_remedy: Remove the duplex tray or check the back area then remove jammed paper.
Turn the printer off wait a few minutes then turn it on again. If it returns service is needed.
Turn the printer off wait a few minutes then turn it on again. If it returns service is needed.
